name: Cereal Ice Cream Squares
recipeIngredient: 3 Cups POST Golden Crisp Sweetened Puffed Wheat Cereal
2 Pints (4 cups) vanilla ice cream slightly softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Line an 8- or 9-inch square pan with waxed paper.
2. Evenly sprinkle half the cereal into the bottom of the pan.
3. Carefully spoon the ice cream onto the cereal and press down lightly.
4. Smooth the top with a spatula.
5. Sprinkle the remaining cereal over the top and press down lightly.
6. Freeze until firm, about 2 hours.
7. Cut into squares or bars.
8. Decorate with raisins, nuts, candies, or chocolate chips if desired.
9. Makes 9 squares.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
